label: 88×31 button
summary: The 88×31 button as an element: fixed size forever, built for badge walls.
era: The 88×31 button, the micro-banner standard every site traded and no committee ever ratified.

classes.name: rs-button88
classes.role: fixed 88×31 box, pixel border, one line of text; never scales

a11y: A real link (or image link) whose text or alt names the destination, 88×31 pixels is no excuse for an empty accessible name.
